evals.prompt: I want to create a skill that forces Copilot to always write TypeScript with strict null checks and explicit return types. I'm working in a React + TypeScript monorepo.
evals.expected_output: A SKILL.md file with YAML frontmatter (name, description) and clear rules for TypeScript strictness, deployable to .github/skills/ for Copilot
assertions: Output includes a SKILL.md file with YAML frontmatter
Frontmatter has name and description fields

evals.prompt: Help me make a skill for Codex that makes it follow our internal API design guidelines. Our guidelines are: REST endpoints use kebab-case, always return JSON with a data and error field, use ISO 8601 for dates.
evals.expected_output: A SKILL.md file with the API guidelines encoded as instructions with reasoning, using the portable Agent Skills format
assertions: Output includes a SKILL.md file (not AGENTS.md)
SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description
Each rule includes a reason or explanation

evals.prompt: I want to build a skill that works on both Claude Code and Gemini IDX. It should help with writing Python docstrings in Google style. Export both formats.
evals.expected_output: A portable SKILL.md for Claude Code (and Codex/Copilot) plus a converted GEMINI.md for Gemini IDX
assertions: Output includes a SKILL.md file with YAML frontmatter
Output includes a GEMINI.md file (Gemini needs separate format)
SKILL.md is the canonical source, GEMINI.md is the conversion

evals.prompt: Create a skill for code review that works across all platforms. I want it to check for security issues, performance problems, and accessibility concerns.
evals.expected_output: A single portable SKILL.md that works on Claude Code, Codex, and Copilot, with a note that Gemini needs GEMINI.md conversion
assertions: Output is a single SKILL.md file (portable across Claude/Codex/Copilot)
Mentions Gemini needs conversion to GEMINI.md
